task: Aggregate a batch of AI-related posts (model releases, research, industry news) from Hacker News and Reddit into a markdown bulleted list of the top 5 stories, written as a Mattermost message for a software team.

inputs_spec.posts: a JSON array of objects with fields: title (string), url (string), source ("hackernews"|"reddit"), subreddit (string, only for reddit), score (int), num_comments (int), body_excerpt (string or null)
